name: build-phase-1-of-the-live-20260513-1821
idea: Build Phase 1 of the live-update editor redesign described in docs/live-update-editor-redesign.md (v6): a shadow-mode dev vertical slice with publishing OFF. Implement the 5-table schema (topics with publication columns, topic_sources, topic_aliases, topic_transitions, editorial_observations) plus the native Anthropic tool-use editor with 4 read tools + 6 decision tools, all 4 dispatcher invariants including the v6 collision-override path, and a pure publisher that posts comparison trace embeds in #main_test. Before any code, resolve the 5 locked decisions (canonicalizer algorithm with fuzz against historical headlines; editorial_observations retention policy; collision similarity threshold + override semantics; rejected-call logging shape — confirm topic_transitions single-table; defer audit on live live_update_candidates and decide whether pending_review is Day-1 schema). Build the runner to replay 20+ recent source-message windows from the prod archive against the new editor with publishing disabled, and post comparison trace embeds (source-message count, tool calls fired, topics posted/watched/updated/discarded, near-miss observations, cost, latency, divergence vs today's editor). Phase 2 prod cutover is explicitly OUT OF SCOPE — stop at the shadow-mode decision gate.

overrides.reason: hermes backend not installed; switching to all-codex profile

latest_failure.suggested_action: Inspect phase output and resume from the failed phase.
